messages.claudeStatuslineNoQuotas: Claude is sending data, but not official Pro/Max limit values yet.
messages.claudeStatuslineMissing: Statusline Claude non configurée. Activez la commande statusline du tableau de bord pour les quotas Pro/Max en direct.
messages.claudeLiveLimitsMissing: Claude live limits are not set up yet. Open Settings to enable them once.
messages.claudeLimitsStale: Claude live limits are out of date. Open Claude Code once to refresh them.

emptyState.heading: Aucune utilisation active
emptyState.message: Aucun fournisseur n’a actuellement de jetons enregistrés ni de données de limite.

claudeSetup.title: Claude live limits
claudeSetup.description: Sets up Claude once and opens Claude Code with a tiny setup check so the dashboard can read real Pro/Max limits.
claudeSetup.statusNotConfigured: Not set up yet. One click sets it up and opens Claude Code.
claudeSetup.statusConfiguredWaiting: Setup is saved. Open Claude Code and send one short message so the live limits can appear.
claudeSetup.statusCapturedNoQuotas: Claude Code is open, but no Claude answer has finished yet. Send the short setup check in Terminal, then return here.
claudeSetup.statusMissingClaude: Claude Code was not found on this Mac.
claudeSetup.statusSettingsInvalid: Claude settings.json is not valid JSON. Please check it manually.
claudeSetup.statusError: Setup could not be checked or saved.
claudeSetup.opened: Claude Code is open with a short setup check. Wait for its answer, then return here.
claudeSetup.openError: Claude Code could not be confirmed as open. If Terminal opened anyway, send one short message there and return here.
claudeSetup.prompt: Reply briefly: The LLM Usage setup check was triggered. If this answer is visible, return to the dashboard; the Claude limits should update within a few seconds.
claudeSetup.statusStale: Claude limits are out of date. Open Claude Code briefly so fresh values can be written.
